title: In Parliament - Douglas Alexander MP for Lothian East constituency
text_excerpt: In Parliament - Douglas Alexander MP for Lothian East constituency Skip to main content Douglas Alexander MP for Lothian East constituency Join Get Involved Donate Homepage About Douglas News & Views Latest News East Lothian Courier Columns Media coverage In Parliament Hansard Parliament TV Voting Record Staffing & Other Costs Contact Privacy Policy More Menu In Parliament I was elected as the Member of Parliament for Lothian East on 4th July 2024. In the days after the election I was also appointed to the Government as a Minister of State for Business and Trade, and subsequently as Secretary of State for Scotland, but being your MP will always be my number one priority. The links in this section allow constituents to find out more about my spoken contributions in parliament, voting record, register of interests, and my staffing and other parliamentary costs. If you cannot find the information you are looking for or have other questions about my work, please contact my office. Hansard Parliament TV Voting Record Staffing & Other Costs Douglas Alexander MP for Lothian East constituency Contact details Email: douglas.alexander.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by Ryan Norton on behalf of Douglas Alexander, both c/o 65 High Street, Tranent EH33 1LN. ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
